key_findings: Cooldown gate successfully suppresses same-asset repeats within the 10-min window. 5 signals (27.8%) were suppressed that would have been sent without cooldown (all passed SignalValueGate as 'allow').

Upgrade override triggered 2 time(s) (11.1%), allowing a repeat because value_score improved by >= 15 points. This prevents cooldown from becoming a hard silence — important signals still get through.
Per-asset tracking confirmed: 5 asset(s) appeared multiple times across batches. Cooldown state correctly tracks each asset independently.

Integration with SignalValueGate: blocked signals skip cooldown check; observe signals still go through cooldown evaluation (but would not be sent regardless). cooldown_suppress + value_observe are independent concerns — observe means 'not valuable enough', suppress means 'too soon'.

conditions_met: Cooldown gate successfully suppresses same-asset repeats — the only blocker identified in v1.11-E is now resolved.
Upgrade override works — important signal escalations are not silently dropped by cooldown.

Cooldown gate is a separate layer from SignalValueGate — separation of concerns is maintained. pre_send_gate can now consume both SignalValueGate (value check) and CooldownGate (rate limit) before sending.
pre_send_gate_readiness.recommendation: Cooldown gate is ready for integration. Next step (v1.11-G): wire CooldownGate between SignalValueGate and pre_send_gate in a dry-run pipeline. Do NOT send to TG yet.

scenarios.objective: Verify that same-asset repeats within 10 min cooldown window are correctly suppressed. ARB appears 3 times (T+0, T+4, T+8 min). First passes, second and third are cooldown_suppress. Different assets (BTC, SOL) pass independently.

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: First occurrence of ARB — no cooldown applied
signal_entries.trigger_reason: ARB 24h 跌幅 7.55% — 第 1 次触发 (T+0min)

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: Same-asset cooldown for ARB: last allowed 4.0 min ago (window=10 min). Value score 100 vs previous 100 (Δ+0 < 15 required for override). Suppressing repeat.
signal_entries.trigger_reason: ARB 24h 跌幅 7.82% — 第 2 次触发 (T+4min)

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: Same-asset cooldown for ARB: last allowed 8.0 min ago (window=10 min). Value score 100 vs previous 100 (Δ+0 < 15 required for override). Suppressing repeat.
signal_entries.trigger_reason: ARB 24h 跌幅 7.90% — 第 3 次触发 (T+8min)

scenarios.scenario_name: Upgrade Override — Score Improvement Within Window
scenarios.objective: Verify that when the same asset reappears within the cooldown window but with a significantly higher value_score (Δ >= 15), the cooldown gate issues an upgrade_override (allowed). ETH: first at score=45 (price only), then at score=75 (price+OI+volume).

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: First occurrence of ETH — no cooldown applied
signal_entries.trigger_reason: ETH 跌幅 7.80% — 弱信号: 只有价格, 无确认因子

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: Upgrade override for ETH: value_score improved from 10 → 115 (Δ+105 >= 15) within cooldown window — allow as upgrade
signal_entries.trigger_reason: ETH 跌幅 8.50% — 强信号: 价格+OI+volume+funding extreme

scenarios.scenario_name: Cooldown Window Expiry — Allow After Window
scenarios.objective: Verify that after the cooldown window (10 min) expires, the same asset can be sent again. SOL appears at T+0 and T+12 — the second should pass as a normal allow (not upgrade_override).

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: First occurrence of SOL — no cooldown applied
signal_entries.trigger_reason: SOL 24h 跌幅 7.24% — 第 1 次 (T+0min)

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: Cooldown window expired for SOL (12.0 min since last > 10 min window) — allow
signal_entries.trigger_reason: SOL 24h 跌幅 6.80% — 第 2 次 (T+12min)

scenarios.objective: Verify that cooldown tracking is per-asset. BTC and ETH each appear twice — their cooldown states are independent. BTC at T+5 should be suppressed; ETH at T+7 should be suppressed; SOL at T+9 is a first occurrence → allow.

signal_entries.cooldown_reason: First occurrence of BTC — no cooldown applied
First occurrence of ETH — no cooldown applied
Same-asset cooldown for BTC: last allowed 5.0 min ago (window=10 min). Value score 100 vs previous 100 (Δ+0 < 15 required for override). Suppressing repeat.
Same-asset cooldown for ETH: last allowed 4.0 min ago (window=10 min). Value score 100 vs previous 100 (Δ+0 < 15 required for override). Suppressing repeat.
First occurrence of SOL — no cooldown applied

scenarios.scenario_name: Mixed Integration — Value Gate + Cooldown Gate Pipeline
scenarios.objective: Full pipeline integration test. Signals pass through SignalValueGate first, then CooldownGate. Tests: (a) blocked signal doesn't enter cooldown; (b) observe signal goes to cooldown check; (c) same-asset repeat is suppressed; (d) upgrade_override works in mixed context.

First occurrence of ETH — no cooldown applied
